summary: Completed testing of multi-language output support feature. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All 8 frontend tests passed (100%). The /api/languages endpoint returns 20 supported languages with male/female voices. The translate-segments and auto-process endpoints accept target_language query param. Landing page shows updated text ('Any Language to Any Language', '20+ languages'). Editor shows output language selector dropdown with 20 languages and dynamic translate button text.
passed_tests: Each language has code, name, male_voices, female_voices fields
All 20 expected languages present (km, th, vi, ko, ja, en, zh, id, hi, es, fr, tl, de, pt, ru, ar, it, ms, lo, my)
Voice objects have id, name, voice fields
Each language has at least one male and one female voice
translate-segments defaults to 'km' when no target_language provided
Landing page shows 'Any Language to Any Language' heading
Landing page shows '20+ languages' in description
Output language selector dropdown visible in editor sidebar after segments loaded
Translate button shows dynamic language name (e.g. 'Translate to Thai')
Voice selectors update to show language-specific voices (Thai: Premwadee/Niwat)
seed_data_creation: Created test project with segments to verify language selector visibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-language output feature fully implemented and tested. Backend has /api/languages endpoint (no auth) returning 20 languages with Edge TTS voices. translate-segments and auto-process endpoints accept ?target_language=xx param (default 'km'). Frontend has OUTPUT_LANGUAGES dict in App.js, targetLanguage state, target-language-select dropdown (data-testid), and dynamic translate button text. Test session: test_session: [REDACTED].

features_verified.api_languages_endpoint: Returns 20 languages with code, name, male_voices, female_voices fields
features_verified.translate_segments_param: Accepts target_language query param, defaults to 'km'
features_verified.landing_page_text: 'Any Language to Any Language' heading, '20+ languages' description
features_verified.output_language_selector: Dropdown with 20 options, visible when segments loaded
